action_set_definitions.name: list_database_objects
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all tables and views in the database matching a search pattern to identify active production structures.

search_pattern.description: SQL LIKE pattern to filter table names (e.g., 'Trade_Ledger%').

action_set_definitions.name: get_table_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves column definitions, data types, and current indexes for a specific table.

table_name.description: The exact name of the table to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: get_performance_statistics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves cardinality, row counts, and data distribution for specific tables to inform query optimization.

table_names.description: List of tables to fetch statistics for.

action_set_definitions.name: simulate_query_execution
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a SQL query in a sandboxed environment to retrieve performance metrics (Logical Reads, Execution Time, and Lock Types) without modifying production data.

sql_query.description: The SQL query or block to test.

transaction_mode.description: Determines if the simulation should simulate a write and then roll back.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_logic_consistency
action_set_definitions.description: Compares the result set of the legacy cursor-based logic against the new set-based logic to ensure zero data divergence.

state_description.schema_metadata: Definition of tables, columns, and data types in the database.
state_description.active_indexes: A list of currently existing indexes on the database tables.
state_description.statistics: Data distribution statistics including row counts, cardinality, and null counts used for cost estimation.
state_description.optimizer_settings: Configuration parameters for the simulated optimizer (e.g., enable_seqscan, random_page_cost).
